top_signals.title: New York and US Northeast Brace for Extreme Heat, Power Alert
top_signals.summary: New Yorkers face a sweltering Tuesday commute as temperatures soar, threatening to topple regional records and strain energy supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indian stock exchange CEO says domestic investors saved markets from ‘freefall’
top_signals.summary: Domestic investors have kept Indian equity market from a sharp correction, as foreign investors have turned bearish.
